title: Quote: portal upgrade checkbox now actually filters the customer-facing list
changes: Changed allUpgrades filter in _buildQuoteHTML from 'show all upgrade-category items' to 'show only items the salesperson ticked' — symmetric with how הוצאות פוטנציאליות already worked. Unchecking a hybrid inverter / SolarEdge / etc. in the portal now removes it from the customer's quote entirely

Customer-facing toggles render in the ON state for the items that did make it through (since the salesperson explicitly chose them); the customer can still toggle each one off if they don't want it, but they cannot resurface upgrades the salesperson hid
If the salesperson unchecks ALL upgrades, the entire 'שדרוגים' section is now skipped (allUpgrades.length > 0 guard was already in place — this just makes it actually triggerable)

Updated initial render values to reflect upgrades-included totals: upgrades-total = sum, project-total = base + upgrades, VAT = (base+upgrades)*1.18, price-line items render display:flex instead of display:none

Added a one-shot _onUpgradeToggle() call right after page.innerHTML = html so payment-stages (pay-dep/p2/p3/p4) recompute against the upgrades-included total — no flash-of-stale-numbers on first paint
Polished _onUpgradeToggle visuals: hardcoded #22c55e ON green and #cbd5e1 OFF gray replaced with var(--ags-mint-deep) and var(--ags-ink-300) for AGS palette consistency
author: Claude

title: AGS redesign polish: kill emoji, fix base64 logo, contain shadow overflow
changes: Replaced 34KB inline base64 topbar logo (legacy) with a clean reference — saved ~34KB per page load

Stripped remaining emoji from the portal: ☀ on generate button → ←, ✍️ from sign button, 🖨 from print/PDF, 💬 from WhatsApp share, 📊 from plan-pill, 📝 from session-badge, ✍️ icon in sig-canvas-hint → 'SIGN' eyebrow text, ☀ from .q-hero::before content
Promoted print button to btn-outline so it's secondary to the primary 'לחתימה דיגיטלית' mint pill
Added html/body { overflow-x: hidden } as a safety net against 4-6px offset shadows protruding past viewport on narrow screens
Added @media (max-width:700px) overrides that shrink offset shadows from 4-6px → 3px on mobile and tighten qpage padding so cards no longer kiss the page edge
Restyled WhatsApp + Download-PDF share buttons to AGS borders + mint variant
author: Claude

title: AGS design system: portal + quote refreshed to brand palette (black/white/mint)
changes: Migrated portal and customer-facing quote from the old SEMO color system (navy/orange/yellow + gradients + 16px radii) to the AGS brand language (black/white/mint #9CF5C4 + flat fills + 4px radii + 4×4 offset shadows)
Replaced gradient sun logo + wordmark with the official AGS logo image (ags-logo.png) in the portal header and the inline-built quote hero
Switched font stack from Assistant to Heebo (300–900) — matches the AGS wordmark and Yaron's dashboard

Re-skinned all major components: form-card, card-header, inputs, radio-btn, gen-btn, plan-card, prefill-toolbar, modals, q-hero, stat-card, fin-card, payment-table, sec-title, sig-wrapper, btn-sig-submit, urban-banner, env-card, etc.
Replaced emoji-icon stat tiles (⚡🔋🔆) with text labels (DC/AC/A/kWh) that match the AGS engineering aesthetic
Removed inline gradients from quote-ui.js (meter notice, plan banner, ROI/payback cards, CTA-sign block) — all now flat black + mint accent
Added 'btn-content-editor' class for the ניהול תוכן button in the header
Backup of pre-redesign code saved to _backup_pre_ags_redesign_2026-05-02/ for fast rollback
Used CSS variable remap: legacy --sun/--sky/--green now alias to AGS tokens, so any inline style="color:var(--sun)" still in JS picks up the new palette automatically
author: Claude

title: Portal: lift HubSpot + Duplicate buttons into a clean prefill toolbar
changes: Moved 'שליפה מ-HubSpot' and 'שכפל הצעה קיימת' out of the client-details card-header into a dedicated white toolbar above the form, with a '⚡ טעינה מהירה:' label and a divider between the buttons
Restored the client card-header to its clean default (icon + title only) — no more cramped wrapping on narrow screens
Moved both modal panels (HubSpot search, paste-link box) out of the card-body to live right under the toolbar, so they pop down adjacent to the trigger button instead of appearing inside the form
Added subtle hover lift on both buttons
author: Claude

title: Fix: hybrid inverter upgrade now respects per-quote price override
changes: Removed hybrid-inv special-case in _renderExtraItem — the upgrade now renders an editable price input next to its checkbox, like every other upgrade (ev/monitoring/etc.)
Removed dead hybridInvPrice and hybridFullPrice plumbing: form fields in index.html, _getFormValues read, _buildState save (hybrP/hybrFP), _setFormFromState restore, and engine params/return values

Bug was: hybridInvPrice field captured user input into state but never reached the price calculation — _getExtras silently fell back to item.defaultPrice (8900) because #price-hybrid-inv was never rendered
Old quotes in KV with hybrP/hybrFP fields remain readable — those fields are now ignored on load, no migration needed
author: Claude

title: Portal: duplicate existing quote + glowing date reminder
changes: Added 'שכפל הצעה קיימת' button beside the HubSpot pull button — paste a previous quote URL to pre-fill the form for editing/regeneration
Supports both short URLs (s-a.gs/q/<id>) and fallback URLs with #q=<encoded> hash
After loading a duplicated quote, the date field pulses with an orange glow until the user focuses or changes it — to prevent accidentally reusing the old date
Added Worker route GET /q/data/:id returning the encoded state as JSON with CORS, used by the duplicate flow
author: Claude

title: Quote: drop concrete-roof surcharge; add KWP price + roof area
changes: Removed 'תוספת לגג בטון' from pricing logic — no longer added to quotes or charged
Removed concretePerKw input field from index.html settings
Added 'מחיר KWP' (price per kWp) line in customer-facing price breakdown
Added 'שטח הגג' (roof area) to customer-facing system info row and spec tables (v1 + v2)
author: Claude

title: Initial version baseline — unified versioning policy
changes: Initial version baseline established under unified versioning policy
Removed all legacy inconsistent version numbers (v1.1.0, v1.0.0, v2.0.0)
Added unified version display in bottom-right corner across all pages
Created version.json as single source of truth
Created changelog.json for version history tracking
Migrated historical changelog from CHANGELOG.md to changelog.json
author: Claude
notes: Prior history (pre-unified-versioning): v1.0.0 (2026-03-22) initial documented version with HubSpot tasks; v1.1.0 (2026-03-23) HubSpot sync without email fix. All reset to 1.00.00.00 under new policy.
